title: On A Wag In Mauchline.
content:
Lament him, Mauchline husbands a',
            He aften did assist ye;
        For had ye staid whole weeks awa,
            Your wives they ne'er had missed ye.
        Ye Mauchline bairns, as on ye press
            To school in bands thegither,
        O tread ye lightly on his grass,
            Perhaps he was your father.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "On A Wag In Mauchline."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
